CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-22-2018 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And For Entry Of Consent Judgment (Zhejiang Yayi Metal Technology Co., Ltd.)
Off Calendar Feb-15-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF ECOLOGICAL RIGHTS FOUNDATION's Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And For Entry Of Consent Judgment (Zhejiang Yayi Metal Technology Co., Ltd.).

Plaintiff Ecological Rights Foundation's motion to approve Proposition 65 settlement as to defendant Zhejiang Yayi Metal Technology Co., Ltd. is granted. No opposition filed and the settlement complies with the requirements for Proposition 65 settlements.

Order and Consent Judgment signed. (see scanned order and consent judgment for details)

Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (D302/HK)
